What can you encode?

URL: Link to any website

Text: Any message or information

WiFi: Share network info (scan to connect instantly)

Email: Pre-filled email with address, subject, and body

Phone: Direct call link

❤️ Made for everyone

Home · Privacy Policy

What is QR Code Generator?

A QR code generator lets you turn links, text, Wi-Fi credentials, or contact details into a scan-ready code that works on phones and tablets.

QR Code Generator helps when you need Generate QR codes in one tab instead of switching to desktop software or a temporary script.

How to use this tool

  1. Select the content type such as URL, text, Wi-Fi, or contact details.
  2. Enter the exact value you want users to scan.
  3. Generate the QR code, test it with a phone, and download the image.

Common use cases

  • Adding scan links to posters, menus, packaging, or event materials.
  • Sharing Wi-Fi credentials in offices, cafes, or temporary venues.
  • Creating fast mobile entry points for landing pages or app downloads.

Tips for better results

  • Test the code on more than one phone camera before publishing it.
  • Keep the destination short and stable when possible.
  • Use enough contrast between the QR code and its background.

Example workflow

type: URL\nvalue: https://instaidea.org/tools/web/\noutput: downloadable QR image

FAQ

Can I generate a QR code for a website link?

Yes. URL QR codes are one of the most common use cases because they send mobile users directly to a page.

Will the QR code still work after I download it?

Yes, as long as the encoded destination remains valid. The image simply stores the scan pattern.

What should I test before printing a QR code?

Check scan distance, contrast, and the final destination URL so users do not hit a broken or incorrect page.
